products.name: Quick Dry Activewear Set
products.description: 2026 New Men Quick Dry Workout Tracksuit Set, Short Sleeve Athletic T-Shirt + 2-in-1 Double Layer Running Shorts, Breathable Lightweight Training Sportswear for Gym Running Swimming Beach

aplus.heading: Premium Quality, Trusted Worldwide
aplus.text: 2026 New Men Quick Dry Workout Tracksuit Set, Short Sleeve Athletic T-Shirt + 2-in-1 Double Layer Running Shorts, Breathable Lightweight Training Sportswear for Gym Running Swimming Beach Product Features This men’s athletic 2-piece sport set includes a quick-dry short sleeve t-shirt and double layer running shorts, designed for all kinds of sports and summer daily use. The top adopts breathable quick-dry polyester fabric, effectively pulls sweat away from skin surface and speeds up air drying, lightweight without sticky feeling after sweating. Crew neck and stretch short sleeves bring zero restraint for arm movements. The matching shorts feature a practical double-layer structure. The inner compression liner offers supportive fit and avoids see-through or chafing; the outer loose layer comes with adjustable drawstring elastic waistband, convenient to tighten or loosen as you like. Side split design greatly boosts mobility during running, jumping and strength training. Minimal brand logo decoration on chest and shorts hem, simple stylish solid black design. Fabric Composition Main Fabric: Polyester + Spandex, high elasticity, wrinkle resistant, fade resistant, durable for frequent washing. Function: Quick dry, moisture wicking, breathable, stretch, lightweight. Size Chart L: Fit weight 42.5 – 52.5 KG XL: Fit weight 52.5 – 62.5 KG XXL: Fit weight 62.5 – 72.5 KG XXXL: Fit weight 72.5 – 82.5 KG XXXXL: Fit weight 82.5 – 90.5 KG Applicable Occasions Gym fitness, running, jogging, swimming, beach, cycling, hiking, basketball training, daily casual loungewear.

products.name: Islamic/Muslim Women Swimsuit
products.description: Women Split Modest Burkini Long Sleeve Zip Front Rash Guard Top + Full Length Swim Pants, Floral Print Conservative Muslim Beach Swimwear

aplus.heading: Premium Quality, Trusted Worldwide
aplus.text:
Product Overview
This women’s modest two-piece burkini swimwear is specially designed for customers who prefer full coverage swimwear, especially Muslim women in the Middle East market. The set combines a long sleeve zip-up rash guard tunic top and matching full-length swim leggings, mixing solid color main body with tropical floral printed sleeves and hem for a unique fashion look, available in 2 classic color schemes.
Design Details
Top: Stand collar with half-length front zipper, easy to adjust tightness; long sleeves with tropical plant print; asymmetrical layered peplum hem to cover abdomen and hips, visually slim figure.
Bottom: High-waisted full-length stretch swim leggings, full leg coverage, elastic waist for all body shapes, no rolling down during movement.
Craftsmanship: Flat lock stitching to reduce skin friction, seamless inner layer for comfortable long-time wear.
Fabric Advantage
82% Nylon + 18% Spandex professional swim fabric:
UPF50+ sun protection, anti-UV long sleeve design
Quick-dry & moisture-wicking, no water retention
High stretch & recovery, not easy to loose after stretching
Resist chlorine and seawater corrosion, long service life
No pilling, no color fading after multiple washes
Applicable Occasions
Sea swimming, surfing, snorkeling, beach volleyball, hot spring spa, pool training, family beach vacation. Ideal conservative swimwear for Muslim women and ladies who want full sun coverage.
Color Options
Black base with pink & green tropical flower print sleeves
Navy blue base with palm leaf print sleeves

aplus.heading: About This Product
aplus.text:
Material: 82% Polyamide(Nylon), 18% Spandex(Elastane)
Features: Quick Dry, High Stretch, UPF 50+ UV Protection, Chlorine Resistant, Salt Water Resistant, Breathable, Anti-Chafing.
Burkini swimwear, modest muslim swimsuit, women long sleeve two piece rash guard, full coverage swim leggings, islamic conservative beach suit, 
UPF50+ sun protection surfing suit, tropical print modest swimsuit, middle east swimwear, plus size burkini, quick dry muslim bathing suit.
